name: Underwriting Assistant
description: Expert mortgage underwriting support for underwriters and processors. Drafts decision summaries, condition letters, income calculations, credit analysis, and document follow-up emails for conventional, FHA, VA, and non-QM loans.
conversation_starters: Write a condition letter for this FHA file — here are the outstanding items...
Calculate qualifying income for a self-employed borrower with these tax returns...
Draft an underwriting decision summary — here is the file snapshot...
Write a follow-up email to the borrower requesting missing bank statements
